title: The J.M. Smucker Co. Scores 100 on Human Rights Campaign's 2023-2024 Corporate Equality Index
text: ORRVILLE, Ohio , Nov. 30, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The J.M. Smucker Co. (NYSE: SJM) has achieved a rating of 100 on the Corporate Equality Index, a report published by the Human Rights Campaign Foundation that evaluates companies on equality and inclusion for LGBTQ+ employees.

title: Gear Up for Smucker (SJM) Q2 Earnings: Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
text: Get a deeper insight into the potential performance of Smucker (SJM) for the quarter ended October 2023 by going beyond Wall Street's top -and-bottom-line estimates and examining the estimates for some of its key metrics.

title: The J.M. Smucker (SJM) Q2 Earnings Coming Up: What Awaits?
text: The J.M. Smucker's (SJM) second-quarter results are likely to reflect gains from core priorities. The recent divestiture of certain pet food brands is expected to have an impact.

title: 3 stocking stuffers you can buy for yourself
text: Stocking stuffers are small, inexpensive presents that help to complete the holiday, so for this screen, the focus was on inexpensive stocks. Inexpensive means a low P/E multiple relative to the S&P 500 NYSEARCA: SPY, but it doesn't mean cheap.

title: Kraft Heinz and J.M. Smucker win upgrades as analysts say weight-loss drug-driven fears are overdone
text: Bernstein analysts upgraded Kraft Heinz Co.'s stock KHC, +1.06% to outperform from market perform on Tuesday, and upgraded J.M. Smucker Co. SJM, -0.50% to market perform from underperform and said the selling of the two stocks amid concerns they will be hurt by the proliferation of a new class of weight-loss drugs is overdone.

title: The J.M. Smucker's (SJM) Latest Acquisition Expands Portfolio
text: The J.M. Smucker (SJM) acquires Hostess Brands to increase its presence. Management forms a new strategic business area to support its expanded brand portfolio.

title: The J.M. Smucker Co. to Report Second Quarter Earnings
text: ORRVILLE, Ohio , Nov. 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The J.M. Smucker Co. (NYSE: SJM) will release its second quarter fiscal 2024 financial results on Tuesday, December 5, 2023.

title: The J.M. Smucker Co. Announces Formation of New Strategic Business Area and Changes to its Leadership Team
text: ORRVILLE, Ohio , Nov. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The J. M. Smucker Co. (NYSE: SJM) ("Company") announced today the formation of a new strategic business area—Sweet Baked Snacks—and the subsequent Officer election of Dan O'Leary to Senior Vice President and General Manager, Sweet Baked Snacks and Pet, effective immediately.

title: The J.M. Smucker Co. Completes the Acquisition of Hostess Brands to Advance Strategy and Expand Family of Brands in Growing Categories
text: ORRVILLE, Ohio , Nov. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The J. M. Smucker Co. (NYSE: SJM) ("Company") announced today the closing of the transaction to acquire Hostess Brands, Inc. (NASDAQ: TWNK) ("Hostess Brands").

title: The J. M. Smucker Co. Extends Offer to Acquire Hostess Brands, Inc.
text: ORRVILLE, Ohio , Nov. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The J. M. Smucker Co. (NYSE: SJM) ("Company") announced today that it has extended its previously announced offer (the "Offer") to exchange for each outstanding share of Class A common stock of Hostess Brands, Inc. (NASDAQ: TWNK) ("Hostess Brands") ("Hostess Brands Shares"), par value $0.0001, $30.00 in cash and 0.03002 of Company common shares, no par value, with cash in lieu of any fractional Company common shares, without interest thereon and subject to any required withholding, pursuant to the terms of that certain Agreement and Plan of Merger, dated as of September 10, 2023, by and among the Company, Hostess Brands, and SSF Holdings, Inc., a Delaware corporation and wholly owned subsidiary of the Company (as may be amended or supplemented from time to time, the "Merger Agreement").

title: These 2 Consumer Staples Stocks Could Beat Earnings: Why They Should Be on Your Radar

title: Burlington Stores Set to Join S&P MidCap 400; Envestnet to Join S&P SmallCap 600
text: NEW YORK , Nov. 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Burlington Stores Inc. (NYSE:BURL) will replace Envestnet Inc. (NYSE:ENV) in the S&P MidCap 400, and Envestnet will replace Hostess Brands Inc. (NASD:TWNK) in the S&P SmallCap 600 effective prior to the opening of trading on Tuesday, November 7. S&P 500 constituent The J.
